Script.name: Vaelrix Core
Script.script: --[[ Vaelrix Core (embedded) This is the same content as vaelrix.lua. Prefer loading the standalone vaelrix.lua for easier editing. Generated from the Scholomance project. ]] -- Paste the complete content of vaelrix.lua here if you are using the XML-only import. -- For the best experience, load vaelrix.lua directly as a Script instead of this XML. print("Vaelrix XML placeholder loaded — use the standalone vaelrix.lua for full features.")
